task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the dashboard at the top of the Graphite interface reads 'Smoothing Comparison'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Raw vs SMA Temperature' is created with the raw temperature metric and its moving average.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph panel titled 'Raw vs SMA Temperature' is visible. The legend or metric list shows 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' and a 'movingAverage' function applied to it with a window size of 20.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Raw vs EMA Temperature' is created with the raw temperature metric and its exponential moving average.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph panel titled 'Raw vs EMA Temperature' is visible. The legend or metric list shows 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' and an 'exponentialMovingAverage' function applied to it with a window size of 20.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Median vs Average CPU Filter' is created with the moving average and moving median of the CPU utilization metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph panel titled 'Median vs Average CPU Filter' is visible. The legend or metric list shows 'movingAverage' and 'movingMedian' functions applied to 'servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization', both with a window size of 20.
A confirmation message indicating the dashboard was saved, or the dashboard appears in the list of saved dashboards, or the UI reflects a saved state without unsaved changes indicators.

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite GUI to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Graphite web interface being interacted with (e.g., clicking through the metric tree, adding graphs), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent selected the actual metrics from the metric tree rather than typing mock data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metric paths in the graphs match the real Graphite metric tree structure (e.g., 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature').

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write a JSON file in a text editor to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard creation process is visible in the Graphite web UI, not in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dashboard must be named 'Smoothing Comparison'. All smoothing functions (movingAverage, exponentialMovingAverage, movingMedian) must use a window size of exactly 20. The metrics used are 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' and 'servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization'.
